attachments.fallback: How to Merge Multiple PST Files into Single PST File? - @WillieAnderson
attachments.text: You can try the DataVare Outlook PST Merge Expert Tool to merge multiple PST files into a single file. It also keeps the original database while combining the Outlook PST file. The software supports ANSI and UNICODE PST files. Test the free demo edition to learn more information.
